chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1373 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.12.2025. Mr. Shankar Lal, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this bail application which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Tufail
